channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: What comes after search? Cloudflare’s CEO says that’s an ‘existential’ question for the internet
item.description: Google has made it much easier to find the answers we seek without navigating to various websites, but that has made it much harder to do business for media companies and other creators.
item.dc:creator: Anna-Louise Jackson, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon will soon be streaming Trump’s ‘The Apprentice’ reality show
item.description: The Apprentice, the long-running reality TV show that boosted Donald Trump’s profile, will begin streaming on Amazon’s Prime Video, the company announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: The US agency that monitors weather will cut another 1,000 jobs, AP sources say
item.description: Multiple sources tell The Associated Press that the Trump Administration is starting another round of job cuts — this one more than 1,000 — at the nation’s weather, ocean and fisheries agency.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump buys Tesla to 'make a statement' about Musk backlash
item.description: President Trump said Tuesday he was buying a Tesla vehicle as he doubled down on his support of Elon Musk, who has come under mounting scrutiny for leading the Trump administration's government cost initiatives. "I'm going to buy because number one, it's a great product. As good as it gets.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The Copyright Office takes on the sticky issue of artificial intelligence
item.description: The U.S. Copyright Office completed the second of two studies of AI and copyrights as it dealt with whether you can copyright outputs created using AI. The post The Copyright Office takes on the sticky issue of artificial intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Alphabet’s Waymo to offer self-driving rides in Silicon Valley
item.description: The company will offer rides to a select group of residents before expanding to more riders in a 27-square-mile swath of the South Bay that includes Mountain View, Los Altos, Palo Alto and parts of Sunnyvale.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Asus might have just changed the display game for good with three new air-purifying monitors - and one of them is ultrawide
item.description: Asus' new monitors may not include any significant improvements to their display quality, but the Taiwanese company is bringing enhancements to indoor air quality in a unique way.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: TikTok's Uncertain Future: Will It Be Sold, Banned, or Receive Another Reprieve?
item.description: TikTok's fate hangs in the balance as it faces a deadline to be sold or banned in the US. President Trump has hinted at a deal, but the process remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: South Dakota pushes labels for political deepfake videos ahead of elections
item.description: South Dakota lawmakers have approved legislation that would impose criminal and civil penalties on those who try to use unlabeled deepfakes to influence voters in the state, with the law now awaiting signature from Gov. Larry Rhoden.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, The Hill

item.title: Go-based TypeScript to dramatically improve speed, scalability
item.description: Microsoft is developing a native TypeScript implementation based on Google’s Go language. The initiative promises dramatic improvements in editor startup speed, build times, and memory usage, making it easier to scale TypeScript to large code bases, Microsoft said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: iOS 19: the 3 biggest rumors so far, and what I want to see
item.description: A new report from a leading Apple tipster suggests iOS 19 will bring huge visual changes to Apple’s mobile operating system – we’ve rounded up the latest rumors.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: New Garmin leak suggests a release is days away, but don't get your hopes up for the Forerunner 975
item.description: A new Garmin filing has been spotted in the FCC database, prompting speculation about what kind of device it could be.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: Lawmakers urge Trump administration to cancel owl-killing plan, say it would cost too much
item.description: A bipartisan group of lawmakers urge the Trump administration to scrap plans to kill more than 450,000 invasive barred owls in West Coast forests in coming decades.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Brown, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2
item.description: Joe Welch, the deputy to the commanding general of the Army Futures Command, said the characteristics of need helps define the problem set for industry. The post How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: IBM wins UK lawsuit against LzLabs for mainframe intellectual property theft
item.description: When it comes to protecting its mainframe technology, IBM wields a pretty big sword. This week, its defense triumphed as IBM won a judgement against LzLabs for violating Big Blue’s intellectual property rights.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI made its way to vineyards. Here’s how the technology is helping make your wine
item.description: Experts say that the wine industry is proof that businesses can integrate the technology efficiently.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Wyoming billionaire 1 of 4 in race to buy TikTok
item.description: Wyoming entrepreneur Reid Raisner told "NewsNation Live" on Monday that the fate of TikTok is a matter of U.S. national security.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: X Owner Elon Musk Blames Cyberattack for Multiple Outages - NewsNation
item.description: X owner Elon Musk blames cyberattack for multiple outages, investigation underway.
item.dc:creator: Ashley N. Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: New delivery robot can haul 2,200 pounds of your stuff
item.description: WeRide's unmanned electric delivery van, the Robovan W5, has 194 cubic feet of cargo space and can carry payloads up to about 2,205 pounds
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 16 hijacked browser extensions expose 3.2 million users
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy recommends deleting 16 browser extensions immediately in response to a report saying more than 3.2 million web users were affected by a security breach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese humanoid robot lands world's first front flip
item.description: A robotics firm in China claims a robot has performed the world's first humanoid robot front flip, which is significantly more difficult than a backflip.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: JFrog unveils JFrog ML for MLOps
item.description: JFrog has released JFrog ML, an MLOps solution designed to bring devops best practices to building, deploying, managing, and monitoring AI/ML workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Driving best value pricing – Let’s go for a ride
item.description: This blog will focus on requirements in the context of the federal government. Sound requirements drive best value pricing and performance for customer agencies The post Driving best value pricing – Let’s go for a ride first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Roger Waldron, Federal News Network

item.title: Lenovo introduces compact, liquid-cooled AI edge server
item.description: Lenovo has announced the ThinkEdge SE100, an entry-level AI inferencing server that’s designed to make edge AI affordable for enterprises as well as small and medium-sized businesses. AI systems are not normally small and compact; they’re big, decked out servers with lots of memory, GPUs, and CPUs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump says he will 'probably' extend TikTok ban deadline if deal isn't reached in time
item.description: "We have a lot of interest in TikTok. China is going to play a role, so hopefully China will approve of the deal," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: LibreOffice downloads on the rise as users look to avoid subscription costs
item.description: Interest in LibreOffice, the open-source alternative to Microsoft Office, is on the rise, with weekly downloads of its software package close to 1 million a week. That’s the highest download number since 2023.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New Google feature flags when you might be getting scammed in real time
item.description: The two features each work to identify and warn you of a possible scam while it's unfolding, either over text or on a phone call.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4
